display.name: Cosmic Flow
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Slow rolling FBM fluid in cyan/orange cosine palette; bass widens the flow.

annotation.technical_notes: 5-octave fractional Brownian motion drives a slow advection field; an Inigo-Quilez cosine palette colors the result in cyan-to-orange. Bass band (first 16 FFT bins) widens the flow's domain warp coefficient.
